name: Mix & Match Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole large chicken breasts, skinned, and boned, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 lb Beef top round steak, sliced into bite-size pieces
1 cup Fresh pea pods, halved lengthwise (Veggies II)
1 cup Water chestnuts, drained and thinly sliced
1/2 cup Fresh or canned Bean sprouts (optional) OR 4 oz Dried Bamboo shoots, drained (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat, vegetables I, and vegetables II, setting them aside.
2. In a bowl, mix cold water with cornstarch, then stir in soy sauce and sherry. Set aside.
3. Cook vegetables I in boiling salted water for 3 minutes. Drain and set aside.
4. Preheat the wok, add oil.
5. Stir-fry garlic for 30 seconds.
6. Add green onions and stir-fry for one minute.
7. Add the crunchy ingredient and bean sprouts or bamboo shoots. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
8. Remove from the wok and return vegetables I to the wok, stirring quickly.
9. If necessary, add more oil.
10. Stir fry half of the meat for 2-3 minutes until browned. Return all meat to the wok.
11. Add the crunchy ingredient and bean sprouts or bamboo shoots. Stir in the soy sauce mixture, then stir into the wok.
12. Cook until thick and bubbly. Return vegetables to the wok and cover. Cook for 1 minute more.
13. Serve 4 - 6 portions.
